● I need to know which approach to take.

╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Which library should we use for date formatting?          │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

  ❯ 1. chrono
    2. time
    3. jiff

  Enter to select · ↑/↓ to navigate · esc to cancel
